title: Toggle Group
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Toggle Group wrapper composed from the local Base UI Toggle Group primitive, shadcn Toggle variants, spacing options, slots, and pure class maps.

registry.reason: shadcn Toggle Group composes the local Foldkit Base UI Toggle Group primitive.
shadcn Toggle Group items reuse local shadcn Toggle variant and size class helpers.
shadcn Toggle Group uses the local class composition helper instead of CVA.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native wrapper and examples.
Provides Effect Schema literals for spacing options.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin Base UI React Toggle primitive is replaced by local Foldkit Toggle semantics.
Origin Base UI React Toggle Group primitive is replaced by the local Foldkit Base UI Toggle Group implementation.
Origin CVA usage is replaced by Effect Schema literals and pure local class maps.
Origin icon examples are represented by local inline SVGs in this batch.
Origin RTL example dependency is replaced by local static RTL strings in Foldkit examples.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.
Origin docs include field-composed examples; this Toggle Group item keeps those as external registry composition rather than importing field source.

examples.title: ToggleGroupDemo
examples.description: Default outline alignment Toggle Group demo with local icons.

examples.title: ToggleGroupDisabled
examples.description: Toggle Group with a disabled item.

examples.title: ToggleGroupFontWeightSelector
examples.description: Multiple-selection font formatting Toggle Group with local icons.

examples.title: ToggleGroupOutline
examples.description: Outline Toggle Group with zero spacing.

examples.title: ToggleGroupRtl
examples.description: RTL Toggle Group with local translated label.

examples.title: ToggleGroupSizes
examples.description: Small, default, and large Toggle Group examples.

deviations.summary: The shadcn wrapper composes local Toggle Group attributes instead of importing upstream Base UI React primitives.
deviations.rationale: Installable Foldkit source must not import React or upstream Base UI runtime packages. The wrapper preserves shadcn slots, classes, spacing, and variants over the local Foldkit primitive.

deviations.summary: Icon examples use local inline SVGs instead of origin icon packages.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on lucide-react. Local SVGs preserve the inline icon DOM role and visual footprint for Toggle Group examples without adding icon registry items.

deviations.summary: RTL example uses local Arabic constants instead of the origin language-selector runtime dependency.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on the origin app language selector. Local Arabic constants preserve the default RTL rendered output.
